test-code.description: BigDecimal with double literal is a violation
two BigDecimal with double literals in one function are each a violation
BigDecimal with String literal is not a violation
Kotlin toBigDecimal() extension on String is not a violation
Double variable passed to BigDecimal constructor is a violation
Double parameter passed to BigDecimal constructor is a violation
test-code.code:
import java.math.BigDecimal
fun bad(d: Double): BigDecimal = BigDecimal(d) // violation

test-code.description: Double expression as BigDecimal constructor argument is a violation
Int literal passed to BigDecimal constructor is not a violation
test-code.code:
import java.math.BigDecimal
fun good(): BigDecimal = BigDecimal(10)
